ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "bat_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throw_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "ml_years" INTEGER /* Years in Major League Baseball */,
  "pro_years" INTEGER /* Total professional years */,
  "on_40_man" INTEGER /* Whether the player is on the 40-man roster */,
  "options" INTEGER /* Remaining contract options */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the contract */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "guaranteed" INTEGER /* Whether the contract is fully guaranteed */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "performance_bonuses" REAL /* Total performance bonuses */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the stats are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in that season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player in that season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Runs batted in by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the roster */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player on the roster */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the player is currently active on the roster */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the player was added to the roster */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the player was removed from the roster */,
  "position_on_roster" TEXT /* Position of the player on the roster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, waiver, release) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is coming from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is going to */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Projected return date after the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, pitching coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the coach */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract ends or was terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the engagement */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., signing, charity event) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the engagement */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the engagement */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the budget */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the year */,
  "salary_cap" REAL /* Salary cap for the team */,
  "operational_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for operational expenses */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget for the fiscal year */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Total budget spent so far */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
